ogTitle: Clifton vs Clifton Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clifton and Clifton Beach.
heading: Clifton vs Clifton Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clifton, Queensland and Clifton Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clifton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Clifton (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clifton or Clifton Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clifton has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Clifton Beach scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clifton scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Clifton Beach scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clifton or Clifton Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clifton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
